ground_truth.title: Online Tuition and Financing | Liberty University
ground_truth.author: Enrollment Team
ground_truth.main_content:
Liberty University Online Tuition and Fees - Consistent Tuition Rates for a Decade. As a nonprofit institution, Liberty University strives to keep costs affordable. Most online tuition rates rank in the top 35% for affordability for 2025, and online undergraduate tuition rates have been frozen for the last 10 years.

Tuition Rates:

Undergraduate: Full-time $390/hour, Part-time $455/hour, Military $250/hour
Graduate: Full-time $580/hour, Part-time $645/hour, Military $290/hour
Seminary: Block rate $2,850/semester, Graduate Military $2,850/semester, Doctoral Military $2,850/semester
Doctorate: Full-time $610/hour, Part-time $675/hour, Military as low as $375/hour

Full-Time Per Hour Rate includes: Undergraduate $390, R.N.-B.S.N. $330, Master's Programs $580, M.Ed. and M.A. in Teaching Programs $430, School of Divinity Master's Programs $2,850 block rate, Ed.S. and Doctorate Programs $610, D.N.P. $850, Military Undergraduate $250, Military Graduate $290, Technology Fee $349 per semester, Book and Online Content Fees $636 estimate.

Part-Time Per Hour Rate includes: Undergraduate $455, R.N.-B.S.N. $330, Master's Programs $645, M.Ed. and M.A. in Teaching Programs $645, School of Divinity Master's Programs $410, Ed.S. and Doctorate Programs $675, D.N.P. $850, Military Undergraduate $250, Military Graduate $290.

Special Program Rates available for various programs.

Financial Resources: Net Price Calculator, Payment Plans, Textbooks & Software, Financial Check-In.

Discounts & Assistance: First Responder Discount, Military Tuition Discount, Scholarships, Corporate Tuition Assistance.

Financial Aid Options: Financial Aid Process, Financial Aid FAQs, Grants, Loans.
